hero.subtitle: The dating app where you can't hide. No makeup. No filters. Right when you wake up. Bobby Lee made us do this.

items.heading: NO FILTERS.
items.description: If it looks like you have an anime glow or smoothed skin, our AI will nuke it. You will look terrible, and that's the point.

items.heading: MORNINGS ONLY.
items.description: Photos can only be uploaded between 5 AM and 11 AM your local time. No sneaking golden hour pics.

items.heading: ONE PHOTO A DAY.
items.description: You take it. You post it. Everyone sees your unedited, sleep-deprived face. Zero do-overs.

items.heading: HUMAN VERIFIED.
items.description: Bots don't have bedhead. If our community flags you for wearing makeup, you're going to the admin review queue.

origin.title: THE ORIGIN
origin.quote: There should be a dating app where everybody looks like this. First thing in the morning... The dating app where you can't hide.

waitlist.title: JOIN THE CHAOS.
waitlist.description: Sign up now. We are letting people in strictly when the servers (and Bobby) decide to wake up.
waitlist.success: You're in. We'll email you before launch.

tech.title: THE SCIENCE OF UGLY
tech.subtitle: How we detect morning faces with 'military-grade' accuracy.

features.title: BOBBY'S BAG DETECTOR
features.description: Our AI analyzes under-eye luggage. If your eye bags aren't heavy enough to carry on a flight, your photo is rejected without warning.

features.title: TITO ANDREW'S RAGE FILTER
features.description: Built using structural analysis of Andrew Santino's red-headed morning pallor. Actively disables ring lights, bans tanning, and penalizes looking too put-together.

features.title: RUDY JULES ENERGY CHECK
features.description: If you look too excited to be alive before 10 AM, Rudy will personally reject your application with a knife. Absolute zero-effort is the only passing grade.

features.title: FANCY B'S EURO-TRASH BAN
features.description: Produced by Andres. Our algorithm scans for anyone wearing a beret, smoking a 'thin cigarette', or attempting to look sophisticated. Instant rejection.

features.title: CARLOS CREEP ALGORITHM
features.description: Analyzes your face for weird late-night hookup energy. If you look like you're about to slide into someone's DMs with purely chaotic intentions, Carlos flags you.

features.title: MOM-LEVEL VERIFICATION
features.description: Every questionable photo goes through the ultimate human verification filter: Bobby's Mom judging you with pure, unfiltered disappointment.

footer.copyright: © 2026 First Thing In The Morning. Not officially affiliated with Bad Friends, but totally inspired by them.
